full_text:
Sun Yong (Zongru) еӯ«йӮ• (е®—е„’)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Yong (еӯ«йӮ•), styledZongru (е®—е„’), was born in Jinan commandery. Failed to complete his camp walls, but was ignored by Bao Xun. Sun Yong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
